content: TASK-044 interrupt done: examples/demo.html editor ergonomics improved. Source panel width is draggable, line numbers are shown and scroll with the textarea, Render moved to the top panel toolbar, and the header subtitle is now simply 'demo'. Browser DOM check confirmed line numbers, resize handle, top Render placement, and header text. Next: continue TASK-009/TASK-010 acceptance work; consider 3D full icon-grid parity and subgraph overlay parity in 3D if the human asks. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
